title: Summary: Turn 3
content: Implemented Pepe monitoring service: triggers at >85% context utilization (30s cooldown), summarizes conversation-turn memories via LLM, vectorizes with local char 3-gram hashing (256d), filters by cosine similarity >0.3, updates session.selectedMemoryIds. Pepe is optional, runs in background during AgentTaskRunner, uses ProviderAdapter for LLM calls.
